status: first proof and witnessing consolidation pass
purpose: Classify the proof, witness, proof-index, report, and witnessing-thesis repositories that form Project Telos' verification substrate.
claim_boundary: This registry is based on current local documentation reads. It is not a release approval, compliance finding, safety decision, or proof that every repo has current passing CI.

evidence.summary: EMET is documented as an external witness with a closed MATCH/DRIFT/UNVERIFIABLE lattice and explicit non-authority boundary.
Proof Surface is documented as a stdlib-only contract/validator layer with eleven proof-packet wedges and honesty gates.
Repo Proof Index is documented as a reviewer-ready index over proof artifacts, not a decision engine.
Proof Surface Report is documented as a Markdown handoff renderer that rejects authority-shaped language.
Witnessing Spine is documented as a citable publication corpus with DOI, ORCID, sector steelmans, and witnessing thesis.

rows.name: EMET
rows.role: external witness and byte/source-view integrity layer
rows.maturity_label: stable v1.0 witness spec with multi-language conformance docs
core_contracts: MATCH / DRIFT / UNVERIFIABLE closed verdict lattice
rows.telos_integration: Use as the external witness point for source/view consistency, model-facing views, proof reports, and release-readiness packets.
rows.publication_boundary: Can support provenance and integrity claims, but must not be described as trust, approval, safety, authorization, or compliance.
next_actions: Map EMET witness receipts into Telos proof packets and Repo Proof Index rows.
Keep closed verdict vocabulary synchronized in Telos docs.
Do not copy rationale corpus into product docs without publication labels.

rows.name: Proof Surface
rows.role: contract validators and domain proof-packet wedges
rows.maturity_label: stdlib-only validator library with eleven domain wedges
rows.telos_integration: Use as the portable proof-packet contract layer below Telos demos, research packets, agent-action receipts, Build runtime receipts, and color/quant proof kits.
rows.publication_boundary: Proof Surface validates records and rejects overclaiming; it does not grant authority, execute actions, or store private payloads.
next_actions: Map Telos public proof demos to the relevant Proof Surface wedge.
Use agent-action, research-claim, ai4science, visual-measurement, and conservation wedges as first integration candidates.
Add a Telos proof-surface bridge fixture once the BuildLang receipt import exists.

rows.name: Repo Proof Index
rows.maturity_label: Python package and CLI for proof artifact indexing
core_contracts: tolerant JSON parsing with evidence-gap summaries
rows.telos_integration: Use to produce cross-repo proof inventories so Telos can find proof packets, receipts, and evidence gaps before release or publication.
rows.publication_boundary: Indexes evidence; does not decide whether evidence is enough.
next_actions: Run Repo Proof Index over Telos proof artifacts once the working-tree proof docs are staged or normalized.
Add a registry row for each proof packet family discovered by the index.
Keep evidence-gap counts separate from release decisions.

rows.name: Proof Surface Report
rows.role: reviewer-facing Markdown report renderer for proof packets and receipts
rows.maturity_label: small Python adapter with CLI and synthetic examples
rows.telos_integration: Use to generate human-readable handoffs for proof demos, papers, and release-review bundles.
rows.publication_boundary: Report is evidence handoff only, not certification, trust verdict, release approval, safety decision, or compliance finding.
next_actions: Create a Telos proof-demo report fixture that renders one research packet and one witness receipt.
Use report output for public demos only after the underlying packet is registry-labeled and verified.
Keep authority-language rejection aligned with Proof Surface and EMET.

rows.name: The Witnessing Spine
rows.role: publication corpus for the witnessing thesis and sector steelmans
rows.maturity_label: published/citable research corpus with DOI and ORCID metadata in README
rows.telos_integration: Use as the publication and theory reference for why proof packets need external witnessing, not as a product validator.
rows.publication_boundary: Citable thesis corpus; claims remain bounded by the corpus' own source discipline and abductive/proof distinction.
next_actions: Add Witnessing Spine to the publication queue as a theory/market-context reference.
Cross-link only the synthesis and citation metadata from Telos front-door docs.
Keep sector steelman claims separate from Telos product capability claims.

proof_layer_stack.job: Re-derive raw bytes and source/view consistency into closed verdicts.
Validate evidence packets, receipts, gates, ledgers, and domain proof-packet wedges.
Make proof artifacts discoverable and summarize evidence gaps.
Render proof packets and witness receipts into reviewer-facing Markdown without authority-shaped language.
Provide the publication-level argument for external witnessing across sectors.

publication_controls: Use EMET to support integrity and source/view consistency, not trust or approval.
Use Proof Surface to validate packet shape and honesty gates, not to grant authority or execute actions.
Use Repo Proof Index to locate and summarize proof artifacts, not to decide sufficiency.
Use Proof Surface Report for human-readable handoff only after the underlying packet is verified.
Use Witnessing Spine as theory/publication context, not as evidence that a Telos tool capability shipped.

telos_integration_priorities.name: Agent action proof packet bridge
telos_integration_priorities.first_artifact: One sandboxed action receipt converted into a Proof Surface agent-action packet and indexed.

telos_integration_priorities.name: Research claim packet bridge
telos_integration_priorities.first_artifact: One causal or QEC packet rendered as proof-surface packet plus reviewer report.

telos_integration_priorities.name: Visual measurement packet bridge
telos_integration_priorities.first_artifact: One read-only color measurement packet with artifact digest, metrics, and display caveats.

telos_integration_priorities.name: AI4Science packet bridge
telos_integration_priorities.first_artifact: One claim-to-experiment packet with measurement, reproduction status, reviewer objections, and negative-result handling.

next_actions: Create a Telos proof-surface bridge fixture for one existing research packet.
Run Repo Proof Index over Telos proof artifacts after deciding which working-tree proof files are in scope.
Add Witnessing Spine to the publication queue as theory context, not as product evidence.
Create a report-rendering fixture with Proof Surface Report for one public proof demo.
Keep proof/witnessing layers separate in public copy: witness, validator, index, report, theory.
